title: Telegram Tool Feed Enhancement: step_complete ✅ + Edit Payload Preview
summary: Add visual distinction for step_complete (🔧 Tool - Step Complete ✅) and show actual edit/write/delete payloads in Telegram tool-feed notifications for clearer progress visibility.

affectedFiles.description: Add extractToolAfterPreview() and isTelegramEditWriteTool() helpers; enhance buildTelegramToolCallMessage() to show step_complete as ✅ and render edit/write payloads in code blocks.
Verify buildTelegramToolCallMessage() is called with full args; no functional changes needed if already wired.

estimatedImpact: Clearer Telegram tool-feed progress visibility; step_complete and file operations now show concrete payloads instead of generic tool names.

executionResult: Implemented and validated. ### ✅ What I changed - **Edited:** `src/gateway/comms/telegram-channel.ts` - Added/enhanced `extractToolAfterPreview(args, toolName)` to: - normalize args safely - map tool names to preview fields for edit/write/delete tools - show deterministic delete previews: - `Delete file: ...` - `Delete lines start-end` - escape HTML and clip long payload previews to 800 chars - Kept/confirmed `step_complete` display as: - `🔧 Tool - Step Complete ✅` - Kept/confirmed edit/write tool preview injection in: - `buildTelegramToolCallMessage(...)` via `...` - **Verified:** `src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts` - No change required. - Confirmed it already passes full args into Telegram notification formatting: - `formatTaskToolNotification(..., data?.args)` ### ✅ Build result - Ran: `npm run build` - Result: **success** (`tsc` exit code 0) ### ✅ Completion logging - Wrote final `write_note` task completion summary with tag `task_complete` for task: - `6dde
